TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: pinsalan" " aring saku cikuy ga, cinbaqan saku l'kaki maku maha sururyax qasa ga sun naha pinsalan lalu nya, yasa balay qu kinkian myan sraral, kwara yaka ru mama ga mnaki kya kwara sraral.
S.PHON: pins~ɕalan" " ariŋ s~ɕaku ʦ~ʨikuj ɣa, ʦ~ʨinβaqan s~ɕaku lʔkaki maku maħa s~ɕururjax qas~ɕa ɣa s~ɕun naħa pins~ɕalan lalu nja, jas~ɕa βalaj qu kinkian mjan s~ɕraral, kwara jaka ru mama ɣa mnaki kja kwara s~ɕraral.
S.FORM: pinsalan" " aring saku cikuy ga, cinbaqan saku l'kaki maku maha sururyax qasa ga sun naha pinsalan lalu nya, yasa balay qu kinkian myan sraral, kwara yaka ru mama ga mnaki kya kwara sraral.
S.PHON: pins~ɕalan" " ariŋ s~ɕaku ʦ~ʨikuj ɣa, ʦ~ʨinβaqan s~ɕaku lʔkaki maku maħa s~ɕururjax qas~ɕa ɣa s~ɕun naħa pins~ɕalan lalu nja, jas~ɕa βalaj qu kinkian mjan s~ɕraral, kwara jaka ru mama ɣa mnaki kja kwara s~ɕraral.
